## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create a reusable table with sortable columns, column visibility toggle, and filters
- Support sticky header on desktop and responsive card layout on mobile
- Use mock datasets and local state for all interactions
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Row height 52–60px; header height 44px
  - Column toggle menu keyboard accessible; focus ring visible
  - Zebra striping optional and theme-consistent

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Sorting, filtering, and column visibility work
- [ ] Desktop table + mobile card variants
- [ ] Accessible interactions for controls
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for both variants and controls open

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `components`, `table`, `priority-high`
